title: Kerala rain: Holiday for educational institutions in Kasaragod on Wednesday
summary: Due to an orange alert for heavy rainfall, all educational institutions in Kasaragod are closed Wednesday, except residential schools. University exams and interviews proceed as scheduled.

title: Home Minister Chennithala withdraws 'drug parlours with baby viper bites' remark
